text.title: practices-django-coding Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for practices-django-coding as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Wrapping a single function in a class: `class ActivationService: def activate(self, ...)`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Adds instantiation overhead, hides the function interface, and agents replicate the pattern into every new service creating needless boilerplate.

failure-mode.description: DB query or business logic inside the view method body (e.g., `Item.objects.filter(...)` directly in `post()`).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Breaks testability and creates duplicate logic when the same operation is needed from a Celery task or management command.
